creator: sharin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 242214
FreeBSD13.2.uEFI.mode Screen Frozen pcib3 failed to allocate initial prefetch window on IBM Server X3250M4

UEFI mode Only:
13.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE releng/13.2-n254617-525ecfdad597 GENERIC amd64

hw.model: Intel(R) Xeon(R) CPU E3-1220 V2 @ 3.10GHz
        Signature: Type 0, Family 6, Model 58, Stepping 9
        Part Number: None
        Size: -===-     Locator: DIMM04         Bank Locator: BANK04
        Size: -===-     Locator: DIMM03         Bank Locator: BANK03
        Size: -===-     Locator: DIMM02         Bank Locator: BANK02
        Size: 4 GB      Locator: DIMM01         Bank Locator: BANK01    Type: DDR3      Part Number: HMT351U7CFR8C-PB  
        Range Size: 4 GB

Product Name: IBM System X3250 M4 -[2583I16]-
(or X3100M4) in this Post:
https://www.truenas.com/community/threads/true-nas-core-13-installation-on-ibm-x3100m4.101880/page-2

boot screen hang at:

pcib3: failed to allocate initial prefetch window: 0xc0000000-0xc0ffffff

but the system still runs in backend, Just Screen Frozen.
